questions: how to treat burn at home
agun e pore gele ki korbo
answers: For burns, immediately run cool (not ice cold) water over the area for at least 10-20 minutes. Don't apply ice, butter, or toothpaste. Cover with a clean bandage and see a doctor if it's severe.
Pore gele first e thanda pani diye 10-20 minute dhoun. Borf ba toothpaste lagaben na. Clean kapor diye cover korun and doctor er kache jan jodi beshi pore thake.

Burn treatment depends on severity. First degree: cool water + aloe vera. Second degree: cool water, don't pop blisters, bandage it. Third degree: call emergency immediately, don't remove clothing stuck to skin.
Pora jaygay shitol pani chalun minimum 10 minute. Ghee, toothpaste, ba borf lagaben na — eta worse kore. Foskay uthle futaben na. Doctor dekhano dorkar hole beshi deri korben na.

feelings.question: how to treat burns?
feelings.answer:
For burns, run cool water over the area for at least 10 minutes until it stops burning. Don't apply ice or butter, as this can cause further injury or infection. Cover with a sterile bandaid to prevent blistering and avoid spreading the fire. If severe burns occur, seek medical help immediately.

feelings.question: how to treat burns?
feelings.answer: Burn treatment depends on the severity of the burn. First degree: cool water + aloe vera. Second degree: cool water, don't pop blisters, bandaage it. Third degree: call emergency immediately, do not remove clothings stuck to skin. For burns, immediately run cool (not ice cold) water over the area for at least 10-20 minutes. Do not apply ice, butter or toopaste. Cover with a clean bandage and see a doctor if it's severe. Porous gel is first used followed by pore gel for severe burns.
